- **Branch:** `[branch-name]`

- **Review date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Reviewer:** [name]

## What Changed

- [Meaningful change 1]
- [Meaningful change 2]

| Gate | Result | Evidence |
|------|--------|----------|
| 0 | pass/fail | [command and output summary] |
| 1 | pass/fail/skipped | [fixture results] |
| 2 | pass/fail/skipped | [10-task numbers] |
| 3 | pass/fail/skipped | [50-task numbers] |
| 4 | pass/fail/skipped | [300-task numbers] |

## Metrics Observed

- **Primary:** [metric] = [value] (threshold: [value])
- **Secondary:** [metric] = [value]

## Precision / False Positive Findings

- FP rate: [number or "not applicable"]
- Known FP scenarios: [list or "none found"]

## What Worked

- [Thing that went well]

## What Failed or Surprised

- [Thing that didn't work or was unexpected]

## Decision

**[merge | continue | kill]**

Rationale: [2-3 sentences]

- [ ] [Action 1]
- [ ] [Action 2]

## Evidence
